nasb.text: if he walks in My statutes and My ordinances so as to deal faithfully—he is righteous and will surely live,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: walks in my statutes, and keeps my rules by acting faithfully—he is righteous; he shall surely live, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 他遵行我的律例，謹守我的典章，行事誠實，這人是個義人，他必定存活。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 遵守我的律例，顺从我的典章——这样的义人必能活着。这是主耶和华说的。
